title: Mitch Robinson
compiled_truth: Mitch Robinson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-25), Mitch Robinson sent 60 and received 456 emails, totalling 516 interactions. Top correspondents: [Don Miller](people/don-miller) (26), [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (23), [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (14), [Stuart Zisman](people/stuart-zisman) (11), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (10).
